title: DocsSearchOutput
description: Search response consumed by text and JSON CLI renderers.

matches.description: Ranked matches from the embedded documentation.

query.description: Query string after CLI-level argument joining.

schema_version.description: Additive schema version for machine-readable output.

heading.description: Best matching section heading, when it is more specific than the page title.

location.description: Stable docs location, relative to the mdBook root.
